data.name: 紅衣少女- 山中鬼魅的傳說
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


我和鄉土研究學會的夥伴搭乘產業列車，準備去探訪當地村落的文化
途中，竟遇上了列車墜毀的意外
驕傲自負的公子哥馬義豪、傷重但善良的許方元、總是嘲弄著我的莫晚晚、膽小愛賭氣的何筱詩……以及沉默的趙恩雅
我們五人迷失在深山之中，在又累又渴的狀態下遇見了一名神秘的紅衣少女



她邀請我們進入她的豪宅，盛情款待著我們
甚至主動脫去衣服，用下面的小嘴吞吐我的肉棒
然而隔天，我們卻在洞穴中醒過來，嘴裏滿是雜草和泥土——我們遇上了山裏的精怪「魔神仔」？
要如何才能離開這座山？紅衣少女的目的又是什麼？是為了榨乾我們的精氣？又或是——

◆玩法


充滿懸疑恐怖要素的探索解謎遊戲
玩家將扮演主角，試著一邊探索真相，一邊脫離紅衣少女的掌控生存下去
散落在各地點的謎題和資源會成為希望——還是絕望？

◆遊戲特色


◆25張基本CG，包含差分550張以上
◆遊戲文字10萬字
◆一位主要女角，三位次要女角
◆民俗傳說題材、克蘇魯風格遊戲
◆TRPG要素
◆含群交、觸手、獵奇表現
◆遊戲結局：含真實結局，共5種

data.short_description: 聽過台灣民間傳說，關於紅衣少女的故事嗎？ 有人說，她是山裏的魑魅魍魎，也有人說，她是被獻祭的少女魂魄，徘徊在深山之中，以美酒饗宴和豐滿曼妙的身體款待迷失的人們，滿足心中的渴望… 然而，事情真的這麼簡單嗎？ 本土傳說Ｘ克蘇魯　色色的懸疑解謎遊戲挑逗內心的慾望
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 俄文, 日文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Girl in Crimson Dress - Tales of the demons in the mountain
data.detailed_description:
◆Story


My partners from the Institute of Vernacular Studies and I boarded a real estate train to visit the culture of a local village.
There was a train crash on the way.
Ma Yi-hao, the proud and egotistical son of a rich man、Hsu Fang-yuan, the wounded but kindhearted、Mo Wan-nan, who always makes fun of me、Ho Siu Sze, the timid and sulky one....And the silent Cho Eun-ah.
The five of us were lost in the mountains and, exhausted and thirsty, we met a mysterious girl in red.



She invited us to her villa and entertained us.
I even took the initiative to take off my clothes and swallow my rod with my little mouth down there.
But the next day we woke up in a cave with our mouths full of weeds and dirt - we had met the mountain monster "Moshina"?
How do we get down the mountain? What is the purpose of the girl in red? Is it to drain us of our essence? Or...

◆Gameplay


Exploration puzzle game with suspense and horror elements
Players take on the role of the protagonist and try to uncover the truth while escaping the control of the girl in red in order to survive.
Will the puzzles and resources scattered throughout the locations bring hope - or despair?

◆Game Features


◆25 basic CGs, including over 550 differentials
◆100,000 words of game text
◆One female protagonist, three female supporting characters
◆Folklore theme, Cthulhu-style gameplay
◆TRPG elements
◆Includes group sex, tentacle play and the grotesque.
◆Game endings: 5 types of endings (including true ending)

data.short_description: Have you ever heard of the Taiwanese folklore about the girl in red? Some say she is a mountain spirit, while others say she is the spirit of a sacrificed young girl who wanders the mountains to satisfy the desires of the lost with a feast of fine wine and her beautiful body.
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, German, Russian, Japanese, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Korean

Minimum:

  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz

  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
